name: Baba Ghanoush
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons tahini, or more to taste
1/4 cup lemon juice, juice of 1 lemon
1 tablespoon olive oil, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Stab the eggplant several times with a sharp knife.
2. Place it on a baking sheet and put it in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 45 minutes to 1 hour, until soft. Allow it to cool.
3. Peel the eggplant and cut into large chunks.
4. Add the garlic, tahini, lemon juice, and salt to a blender with 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Blend until smooth.
5. Pour the mixture into a bowl and drizzle with additional olive oil on top.
6. Sprinkle with sumac or chopped parsley.
